description: String Remove is a ProtoFlux node that allows you to remove part of a provided Str (String) of a given Length (int) starting at StartIndex (int).

fields.Str: The string to remove a segment from.
fields.StartIndex: The starting point of removal from Str (String).
fields.Length: How long of a segment to remove from Str (String).
fields.* ([[Type:String|String]]): Str (String) with a segment starting at StartIndex (int) to Length (int) + StartIndex (int) removed.
